name: mac-messages-mcp
description: Query, search, and send macOS Messages through a local MCP server.
long_description: Mac Messages MCP runs locally on macOS and provides Claude Desktop with tools for reading recent Messages, fuzzy-searching conversations, resolving contacts, sending iMessage/SMS messages, listing chats, checking permissions, and finding or fetching message attachments. It requires Full Disk Access for Claude Desktop or the terminal used to run it.

tools.name: tool_get_recent_messages
tools.description: Read-only recent Messages lookup with optional contact or group chat ID filtering. Requires Full Disk Access and returns a plain-text message summary.

tools.name: tool_send_message
tools.description: Sends one outgoing iMessage or SMS/RCS through Messages using E.164 phone numbers or emails. Requires Messages automation permission and returns a plain-text success or error.

tools.name: tool_find_contact
tools.description: Read-only AddressBook contact lookup by fuzzy name match. Requires Contacts permission and returns E.164 phone numbers for contact:N selection.

tools.name: tool_check_db_access
tools.description: Read-only diagnostic for Messages database access and Full Disk Access permission errors.

tools.name: tool_check_contacts
tools.description: Read-only contact availability check returning a count and sample AddressBook entries.

tools.name: tool_check_addressbook
tools.description: Read-only diagnostic for AddressBook database access and Contacts permission errors.

tools.name: tool_get_chats
tools.description: Read-only group chat listing that returns chat names and IDs for group message sends.

tools.name: tool_check_imessage_availability
tools.description: Read-only iMessage capability check for a phone number or email; does not send a message.

tools.name: tool_fuzzy_search_messages
tools.description: Read-only fuzzy message search with similarity scores across a configurable time window.

tools.name: tool_search_attachments
tools.description: Read-only attachment metadata search by date range, contact, and MIME type; returns IDs for later fetch.

tools.name: tool_get_attachment
tools.description: Read-only attachment fetch by database ID, returning inline images when small enough or a local path otherwise.
